subject: docs(claude): add trigger words and input prompt prohibition
body:
Add Triggers section to CLAUDE.md with 8 reusable trigger words
(review, audit, docs, cleanup, mobile, debug-check, sweep, suggestions)
that work across all Claude interfaces (CLI, desktop web, mobile web,
mobile app). These replace slash commands which don't persist across
interfaces.

Also adds prohibition against interactive input prompts/selection UIs
which break sessions across multiple interfaces.

Tags: documentation, ai-instructions, cross-project
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: ai-workflow
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_01VByEekk2oy2cscbJHSVNzP
title: add trigger words and input prompt prohibition
